input.question: Which courses have been offered in the most sections overall?

payload.question: Which courses have been offered in the most sections overall?

output.sql:
SELECT
  courses.course_id AS course_id,
  courses.course_title AS course_title,
  COUNT(sections.section_id) AS section_count
FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
GROUP BY courses.course_id, courses.course_title
ORDER BY section_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

visualization.description: Top 10 courses by total number of sections offered.
visualization.title: Top 10 Courses by Number of Sections Offered

payload.sql:
SELECT
  courses.course_id AS course_id,
  courses.course_title AS course_title,
  COUNT(sections.section_id) AS section_count
FROM courses
JOIN sections ON courses.course_id = sections.course_id
GROUP BY courses.course_id, courses.course_title
ORDER BY section_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
